alert_upload_graph_scale: Please upload a Graph in order to change Scale
alert_select_general_view_spt: Please select General View for building SPT
alert_select_general_view_mst: Please select General View for building MST
alert_build_path_first: Please build a path from some source to destination or jump to Network Reaction On failure Tab in order to see general network reaction without any SPT paths
alert_upload_graph_physics: Please upload a Graph in order to stop physics
alert_choose_and_load_graph: Please, choose a graph from previously uploaded and Load it firstly
alert_choose_graph_load: Please, choose a graph from previously uploaded and Load it
error_load_networks: Error loading networks. Please try again.
error_load_nodes: Error loading nodes. Please try again.
error_load_areas: Error loading areas. Please try again.
error_load_statistics: Unable to load graph statistics. Please ensure a graph is loaded.
error_graph_build: An error occurred while building the graph. Please contact the administrator using the details provided in the Links tab.
error_no_permission: You do not have permission to modify this graph
error_graph_not_found: Graph not found or access denied
notify_physics_disabled: Physics was disabled. So move nodes one by one without affecting other nodes.
notify_ecmp_failed: There are {0} ECMP link which did not pass this check. If one of ECMP link with lowest cost goes down - the backup path will be redirected via another hosts, not via this ECMP
notify_create_groups: Please create groups in Devices Tab and assign devices to them!
notify_interarea_failed: There are {0} backup paths, which go via third locations if primary link between two location goes down.
notify_no_asymmetric: The graph does not have asymmetric edges/paths.
notify_unidir_unsym: There are {0} unidirectional and {1} asymmetric edges
notify_no_duplicated: The graph does not have duplicated terminated subnets.
notify_reload_for_spt: For building SPTs and using NetworkReactionOnFailure Load Dynamic Graph again.
desc_network_reaction: Simulate a link or router shutdown. Look at traffic flow around failed link or router
desc_simulate_link_failure: Simulate a link failure just clicking on a link
desc_simulate_router_failure: Simulate a router failure through right-click menu
desc_cost_changes: Network reaction on ospf edge cost changes on the fly (right-clicked edge menu).
desc_build_shortest_paths: Build the shortest paths, find backup paths.
desc_spt_from_source: Build the shortest path from source node (router) to the destination (right-clicked node menu).
desc_simulate_along_spt: Simulate a link failure along the shortest paths and find backup paths (click on colored edge).
desc_find_node: Find a node on the network graph by selecting the node in "Find node by RID/IP" dropdown list.
desc_cost_rebuild: Shortest path rebuilding by changing ospf cost on the fly (right-clicked edge menu).
desc_heatmap: Size of node is correlated with a number of backuped (green)/ not-backuped (red) stub networks
label_mst_checkbox: Print Minimum Shortest Tree (MST) for the node. If MST is enabled. Show all paths on the fly, since hover the node. Show all
label_diff_paths: Diff IN and OUT paths from hovered node
label_shared_media: Mark all shared media links (which have common DR) as deleted
context_menu_spt_from: Build the shortest path from this Node
context_menu_spt_to: Build the shortest path to this Node
context_menu_spt_from_html: Build the shortest path from this Node
context_menu_spt_to_html: Build the shortest path to this Node
label_find_node: Find node by RID/IP. Find network:
node_failure_border_shutdown: It seems that you shutdown border node
analytics_item_ecmp: Main and backup paths via the same ECMP (beta)
spt_warn_ins: Press on colored link in order to simulate link outage
spt_warn_note: Note, there is a limit on graph size for ECMP calculation, check doc to increase it.
